ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team name */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team name */,
  "home_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "home_half_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team at half-time */,
  "away_half_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team at half-time */,
  "match_referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee officiating the match */,
  "home_manager" TEXT /* Name of the home team's manager */,
  "away_manager" TEXT /* Name of the away team's manager */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_short_name" TEXT /* Short name for the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Team logo (stored as a URL or binary data) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., English Premier League) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium FOREIGN KEY ("stadium") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "home_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the home team */,
  "away_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the away team */,
  "home_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target taken by the home team */,
  "away_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target taken by the away team */,
  "home_possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession by the home team */,
  "away_possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession by the away team */,
  "home_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corner kicks taken by the home team */,
  "away_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corner kicks taken by the away team */,
  "home_offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside calls against the home team */,
  "away_offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside calls against the away team */,
  "home_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards given to the home team */,
  "away_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards given to the away team */,
  "home_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards given to the home team */,
  "away_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards given to the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the prediction belongs to */,
  "win_prob_home" REAL /* Probability of the home team winning */,
  "win_prob_away" REAL /* Probability of the away team winning */,
  "draw_prob" REAL /* Probability of a draw */,
  "expected_goals_home" REAL /* Expected number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "expected_goals_away" REAL /* Expected number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Name of the prediction model used */,
  "prediction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is played */,
  "league_level" INTEGER /* Level of the league */,
  "relegation_places" INTEGER /* Number of teams that get relegated to a lower league at the end of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "stadium_address" TEXT /* Address of the stadium */,
  "stadium_surface" TEXT /* Type of surface the stadium has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored by the player */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_lineups" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "starting_lineup" INTEGER /* Whether the player was in the starting lineup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "team_id", "player_id")
)
